overview.summary: Model score 7 vs user score 9 (gap -2). Primary drivers: Task-Environment Mismatch. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Compensatory weighting from motion stability likely offset negative environmental signals more than appropriate.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio captured environmental pattern; next run should penalize repeated speech bursts more aggressively for reading tasks.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Frequent posture changes should reduce focus confidence unless corroborated by improved audio and vitals.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: Use GPS consistency to support motion interpretation while preserving audio-first weighting for environmental factors.

judgment_policy_next_run: Reduce compensatory credit from stationary motion when primary factors are adverse.
Preserve GPS as secondary evidence and prevent direct score inflation from location stability.
